ksa_text: Skill in integrating and synthesizing data from multiple sources and tools, including data fusion, cross-source correlation, and producing coherent analytical findings from heterogeneous datasets.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data aggregation tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of data aggregation tools and techniques
Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-001 (AB, Skill) maps to Performance Analyst scope as strong fit. Composite score 0.4368 clears the strong fit threshold of 0.35. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.437, onet=0.430, nice=0.417. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4368 for strong fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4368 with signal across ddat=0.437, onet=0.430, nice=0.417 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4368, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
